FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADl ASTROLOGY 13
FUNDAMENTALS OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF
NADl ASTROLOGY
This book explains the various career aspects and their
BHAV AS, the causitivities in the form of practical charts of
natives.
It can be noted that the fortune of the wife containing'
various characteristics are denoted through the Boy's horoscope
and in the same manner, from the charts of the girl, her would-
be's (husband's) furture, various characteristics carrer, status and
many other aspects are well covered for the benefit of the
readers, with various horoscopes/ charts in quite a practical
manner, besides giving many example also.
Following are some of the briefmgs :-
SATURN Career aspects
MARS Fortune of husband
VENUS Fortune of wife
MERCURY Various aspects of educational lines.
